description: The beadle as cashier of the Qodesh, ca. 1162. The beadle Mahfuz, of the Synagogue of the Palestinians, receives the revenue from the orchard of the qodesh. This is a short entry, signed by two members of the court. In another entry, the revenue from rent collected from tenants of the qodesh by the parnas Abu'l-Ma'ali is also received by the same beadle. The record also mentions the person under whose authority these operations take place, namely the Gaon Netaniel b. Moshe. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 291 #61)
description_he: השמש כגזבר הקדש, כ-1162: השמש מהפוז, בבית הכנסת הארץ ישראלי, מקבל הכנסות מפרדס ההקדש ומשכ"ד שגבה הפרנס אבו אל-מעאלי. בסמכות הגאון נתנאל בן משה.
